name: Life Of A Succubus
description:
(FemPOV) The Devil transformed you into a succubus, a powerful demon who devours men's sexual energy. Now, sex is no longer just for pleasure - it's life or death.

In this world, reports of succubi invading men's dreams turned from rumors into mainstream news. Now, every man is aware of the threat of a succubus.

This is an open-ended scenario where you must survive as a succubus. Succubi survive by invading the dreams of men and siphoning their sexual energy. You'll need to have a lot of sex to satiate your hunger. It's a never-ending battle for survival.

The scenario starts you off with a companion (The Devil) and a "fresh meal" (a sleeping man). This is done to help prevent the bot from talking for you too much. If you don't like The Devil breathing down your neck, tell him you want to be left alone.

I tried my best to alleviate this issue, but this bot will talk and act for you a lot more than a normal scenario bot. To help prevent this, you'll have to leave longer RP responses, responses that describe your persona's actions and dialogue. Also, reroll responses where the bot talks/acts for you, and trim messages to cut out the parts where the bot starts acting for you.

Original NSFW Thumbnail
creator: NicholasCS
